# Fix Plan (cycle 2)
**Generated by plan-runner aggregator on 2026-05-17**
**Source bugs report:** docs/plan-runner/2026-05-17/cycle-1/bugs.md
**Original plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-dnd-weapons-phase-3-combat-hooks.md

---

## Task 1: Fix wave-4-agent-1-bug-1 + wave-4-agent-1-bug-3 -- Register chiseledTest task and test source set with Stonecutter
**Files:** stonecutter.gradle.kts, stonecutter.gradle, build.gradle.kts
**From bugs:** wave-4-agent-1-bug-1 (P0, missing_requirement), wave-4-agent-1-bug-3 (P0, missing_requirement)

### Acceptance criteria
- `stonecutter.gradle.kts` and `stonecutter.gradle` both define a `chiseledTest` task using `ofTask("test")`, mirroring the existing `chiseledBuild` pattern
- `build.gradle.kts` registers the `src/test` source set with Stonecutter so that per-version `build/chiseledSrc/test` directories are created
- `./gradlew chiseledTest` runs successfully and invokes the `test` task across all 5 subprojects (1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 26.1.2)
- Stonecutter version gates in test source files are processed per-version (prerequisite for Task 2 and Task 3 fixes)

### Context
```
stonecutter.gradle.kts and stonecutter.gradle both define only chiseledBuild and
chiseledRunGametest. No chiseledTest task is registered.

src/test/kotlin tree exists with 5 JUnit test files but no per-version
build/chiseledSrc/test directory is created. Stonecutter only processes source
sets registered with it.
```

---

## Task 2: Fix wave-2-agent-1-bug-1 -- Stonecutter-gate makeMockPlayer() calls in CombatHooksGametest.kt
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/test/CombatHooksGametest.kt
**From bug:** wave-2-agent-1-bug-1 (P0, incorrect_implementation)

### Acceptance criteria
- `net.minecraft.world.level.GameType` is imported inside a `//? if >=1.21.2 { ... //?}` stonecutter block
- All 5 `ctx.makeMockPlayer()` call sites (lines 100, 123, 145, 167, 190) are wrapped with stonecutter guards:
  `//? if >=1.21.2 { ctx.makeMockPlayer(GameType.SURVIVAL) //?} else { ctx.makeMockPlayer() //?}`
- `./gradlew :1.21.4:build` succeeds after this fix
- `./gradlew chiseledBuild` succeeds across all 5 subprojects

### Context
```
Lines 100, 123, 145, 167, 190 all call ctx.makeMockPlayer() with no arguments.
MC 1.21.4 (>=1.21.2) requires makeMockPlayer(GameType). The file has no stonecutter
version gate around these calls and no import for net.minecraft.world.level.GameType,
so the module fails to compile on the 1.21.4 subproject. Confirmed by wave-2-agent-2's
build failure report.
```

---

## Task 3: Fix wave-3-agent-1-bug-1 -- Lazy-resolve Registries.ITEM in SpecRegistry to avoid 'Not bootstrapped' in 1.20.1 tests
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/registry/SpecRegistry.kt
**From bug:** wave-3-agent-1-bug-1 (P1, incorrect_implementation)

### Acceptance criteria
- `TagKey.create(Registries.ITEM, loc)` at line 78 no longer eagerly initializes `BuiltInRegistries` at class-load time
- Preferred approach: either (a) store the `TagKey` factory in a `companion object` property that is only evaluated post-bootstrap, or (b) change `bindRoleTag` to accept `TagKey<Item>` directly and move string parsing to call sites
- `SpecRegistryTest` passes on the 1.20.1 subproject without requiring MC Bootstrap
- `./gradlew chiseledTest` shows all SpecRegistry tests green across all 5 versions

### Context
```
TagKey.create(Registries.ITEM, loc) at line 78 forces BuiltInRegistries.<clinit> to run.
In the 1.20.1 test environment the registries are not bootstrapped before SpecRegistryTest,
so any call path through parseItemTagKey (e.g. bindRoleTag) throws a 'Not bootstrapped'
error at runtime. This was masked by compile failures before wave 3.
```

---

## Task 4: Fix wave-2-agent-1-bug-2 -- Add missing 9th gametest to CombatHooksGametest.kt
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/test/CombatHooksGametest.kt
**From bug:** wave-2-agent-1-bug-2 (P1, missing_requirement)

### Acceptance criteria
- Total gametest count across `CombatHooksGametest.kt` and `TooltipInjectionGametest.kt` is exactly 9
- The missing test is most likely `heavy_knockback` — verify against plan lines 1274-1601 and add accordingly
- Both files have their gametest entrypoints registered in `fabric.mod.json` under the `fabric-gametest` list
- `./gradlew :1.21.4:runGametest` shows all 9 gametests passing

### Context
```
CombatHooksGametest.kt defines 6 test methods.
TooltipInjectionGametest.kt defines 2 test methods.
Total = 8 gametests. Acceptance criteria for wave-2-agent-1 and wave-2-agent-2 both
state 'All 9 gametests pass'.
Plan section lines 1274-1601 contains the full gametest specification.
```

## Task 5: Fix wave-4-agent-1-bug-2 -- Verify and resolve startRiding() Stonecutter substitution on test sources
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/test/CombatHooksGametest.kt
**From bug:** wave-4-agent-1-bug-2 (P1, incorrect_implementation)

### Acceptance criteria
- `./gradlew :1.21.4:build` succeeds with no compile errors related to `startRiding()` argument count
- `./gradlew chiseledBuild` succeeds on all 5 subprojects
- If Stonecutter substitution was not being applied to test sources (due to bug in Task 1), confirm this is resolved by Task 1's source-set registration fix
- If the fork at lines 222-226 is genuinely broken, correct it

### Context
```
Wave-4-agent-1 reported a compile failure at line 223 for 1.21.4. Reading the file
shows lines 222-226 ARE correctly Stonecutter-forked. Either the report was stale OR
Stonecutter substitution isn't being applied to test sources. Unverified without a
build run. Likely resolves with Task 1 (test source set registration).
```

## Task 6: Fix wave-4-agent-2-bug-2 + wave-4-agent-2-bug-3 -- Verify PlayerAttackMixin injection fires and execute chiseledRunGametest
**Files:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/mixin/PlayerAttackMixin.kt, src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/test/CombatHooksGametest.kt
**From bugs:** wave-4-agent-2-bug-2 (P1, incorrect_implementation), wave-4-agent-2-bug-3 (P1, missing_requirement)

### Acceptance criteria
- `./gradlew chiseledRunGametest` is actually executed (not static-inspection-only)
- All 9 gametests pass on all 5 MC versions (45 total)
- `@ModifyArg` on `Entity.hurt` (<1.21.4) / `Entity.hurtOrSimulate` (>=1.21.4) is confirmed to fire via gametest pass or logging evidence
- Confirmed on 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, and 26.1.2
- Any runtime mixin failures are diagnosed and fixed

### Context
```
Mixin architecturally rewritten: target now @ModifyArg(index=1) on Entity.hurt (<1.21.4)
/ Entity.hurtOrSimulate (>=1.21.4) inside Player.attack(Entity). Plausible per static
bytecode analysis but no gametest run confirms injection fires.

Acceptance criterion: './gradlew chiseledRunGametest succeeds across all 5 subprojects'
and 'All 9 gametests pass on all 5 versions (45 passing tests total)'. Agent explicitly
states 'chiseledRunGametest was not actually run — fixes are static-bytecode-inspection-based.'
```

---

## Task 8: Fix wave-2-agent-1-bug-3 -- Create missing shortsword role tag file for IronSword tooltip gametest
**File:** src/main/resources/data/dndweapons/tags/items/role/shortsword.json
**From bug:** wave-2-agent-1-bug-3 (P2, missing_requirement)

### Acceptance criteria
- `data/dndweapons/tags/items/role/shortsword.json` exists and contains `minecraft:iron_sword` in its `values` array
- `vanillaIronSwordTooltipContainsStatBlock` gametest passes and the Iron Sword tooltip contains `piercing` and `Finesse`
- File is present in all per-version subproject resource paths (or in the shared `src/main/resources` tree if shared)

### Context
```
vanillaIronSwordTooltipContainsStatBlock asserts Iron Sword tooltip contains 'piercing'
and 'Finesse', which requires tag-driven tooltip injection to map Iron Sword into the
shortsword role. The tag file is not guaranteed to exist.
```

---

## Task 9: Fix wave-3-agent-1-bug-2 -- Audit PlayerAttackMixin @At descriptor across all 5 versions; add fork if needed
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/mixin/PlayerAttackMixin.kt
**From bug:** wave-3-agent-1-bug-2 (P2, incorrect_implementation)

### Acceptance criteria
- Mixin injection is confirmed to succeed in all 5 environments (evidenced by gametests passing in Task 6)
- If any subproject uses a mapping set where the DamageSource descriptor differs, a stonecutter fork is added around the `@At` target string
- Decision (fork added OR confirmed unnecessary) is documented in the task output

### Context
```
The @At target descriptor 'Lnet/minecraft/world/damagesource/DamageSource;F' is a
single string with no stonecutter/preprocessor fork. If any of the 5 subprojects uses
a mapping set where the intermediary name differs, the mixin will silently fail to inject
at runtime without a compile error.
```

---

## Task 10: Fix wave-4-agent-2-bug-4 -- Determine sweep-entity modifier behavior and add guard if needed
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/mixin/PlayerAttackMixin.kt
**From bug:** wave-4-agent-2-bug-4 (P2, incorrect_implementation)

### Acceptance criteria
- Design spec consulted and intended behavior for sweep entities is determined
- If sweep entities should NOT receive the DnD damage modifier: `@ModifyArg` is replaced with `@ModifyVariable` on the primary damage local, OR a guard filters sweep invocations
- If sweep entities SHOULD receive the modifier: behavior is explicitly confirmed as correct in a code comment
- A relevant gametest asserts the correct sweep behavior

### Context
```
@ModifyArg on the INVOKE inside Player.attack(Entity) fires for every entity hit,
including sweep targets. Spec does not explicitly state whether sweep entities should
get the modifier.
```

---

## Task 11: Fix wave-4-agent-2-bug-5 -- Smoke-test and fix mixin descriptor on 26.1.2 identity-mapping build
**File:** src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/mixin/PlayerAttackMixin.kt
**From bug:** wave-4-agent-2-bug-5 (P2, incorrect_implementation)

### Acceptance criteria
- Mixin injection confirmed to fire on the 26.1.2 subproject (evidenced by gametests passing)
- If identity tiny v2 stub causes descriptor resolution to differ from other versions, a stonecutter fork for `>=26.1.2` (or equivalent) is added
- `./gradlew :26.1.2:runGametest` shows all 9 gametests passing

### Context
```
26.1.2 uses identity tiny v2 stub (no intermediary remapping). Mixin descriptor
resolution at runtime may behave differently on this novel mapping config.
```

## Task 12: Fix wave-4-agent-3-bug-2 + wave-4-agent-3-bug-3 -- Create git tag and clean up working tree
**Files:** .gitignore, manifest.json (review), git tag
**From bugs:** wave-4-agent-3-bug-2 (P2, missing_requirement), wave-4-agent-3-bug-3 (P3, scope_drift)

### Acceptance criteria
- `versions/*/logs/` (or equivalent log output paths) is added to `.gitignore` so future runs do not leave untracked log directories
- `manifest.json` changes are either committed with a descriptive message or reverted if unintentional
- Working tree is clean (`git status` shows nothing to commit)
- `phase-3-combat-hooks` git tag is created at the tip of Phase 3 work: `git tag phase-3-combat-hooks && git push --tags`
- This task runs last, after Task 7 confirms the full matrix is green

### Context
```
Criterion 14 requires phase tagged 'phase-3-combat-hooks'. Agent-3 is static-read-only
and could not create the tag.

Working tree has a modified manifest.json and an untracked versions/1.20.1/logs/ directory.
```
